title: Changing a one-way connect board column to two way
excerpt:

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would be nice to be able to change a one-way connect board column into two way connect board column after creation.

If someone already adds a lot of data into this column and later realizes that they needed a two way column, its a pain to replicate it again.

The data is already there, so it should be simple to switch between one-way to two way. Even Notion provides a simple toggle switch for this while editing its relation property

PS: We have an app that helps in visualizing connections across boards, and this is a common pain-point for lot of our customers getting started with the connect board column
